name: Wild Storm
description: Wild Storm is a masked swordsman of an unknown species. He has ivory horns pointing sideways, on the sides of his head. His mask possesses the Air Element's emblem on his mask's 'forehead', between its metal eyes. His glowing white eyes are the only visible part of his face inside the mask. The armor covering his torso, arms and legs are black, with some golden decorations on his chest's armor. He wears pentagonal steel tassets, gauntlets and clawed boots, and his limbs are additionally protected by the strapped blue guards with golden edges, each made of three pentagonal plates. There is also some sort of a short cape made of blue feathers on his upper back and shoulders.
biography: By the time he was 10 years old, Wild Storm had already mastered the Air Blade. With no family of his own, he spent much of his youth traveling throughout Skylands, offering his combat services to the highest bidder as a soldier of fortune. On one such occasion, he was hired by Kaos to break into a pirate outpost in Skyhighlands to steal their legendary gold detector. But little did Wild Storm know, he was only being used by Kaos to scout their defenses – and he was captured by the pirates! While imprisoned in the highest tower, the powerful winds blew through his cell, fueling his anger. But Wild Storm would not be contained! Harnessing the storm's energy, he grew 3 times his size and exploded out of his prison – vowing to put a stop to Kaos once and for all. Soon after, he met Master Eon, who agreed to help him, provided Wild Storm would share his skills in swordsmanship with other Skylanders, as a Sensei of the Knight Class!
personality: Wild Storm is a disciplined and determined warrior who spent his youth as a soldier of fortune. Though initially motivated by payment, his betrayal by Kaos fueled a righteous anger and a vow to stop the villain. He is honorable enough to share his mastered skills in swordsmanship with others as a Sensei, showing a growth from a mercenary to a mentor.

story.content: Wild Storm is a masked swordsman of an unknown species. He has ivory horns pointing sideways, on the sides of his head. His mask possesses the Air Element's emblem on his mask's 'forehead', between its metal eyes. His glowing white eyes are the only visible part of his face inside the mask. The armor covering his torso, arms and legs are black, with some golden decorations on his chest's armor. He wears pentagonal steel tassets, gauntlets and clawed boots, and his limbs are additionally protected by the strapped blue guards with golden edges, each made of three pentagonal plates. There is also some sort of a short cape made of blue feathers on his upper back and shoulders. Wild Storm's sword is very decorative; it possesses golden feather decorations and the Air symbol engraved on the blade's base. The turquoise blade splits into two tips, with the gap between them.

By the time he was 10 years old, Wild Storm had already mastered the Air Blade. With no family of his own, he spent much of his youth traveling throughout Skylands, offering his combat services to the highest bidder as a soldier of fortune. On one such occasion, he was hired by Kaos to break into a pirate outpost in Skyhighlands to steal their legendary gold detector. But little did Wild Storm know, he was only being used by Kaos to scout their defenses – and he was captured by the pirates! While imprisoned in the highest tower, the powerful winds blew through his cell, fueling his anger. But Wild Storm would not be contained! Harnessing the storm's energy, he grew 3 times his size and exploded out of his prison – vowing to put a stop to Kaos once and for all. Soon after, he met Master Eon, who agreed to help him, provided Wild Storm would share his skills in swordsmanship with other Skylanders, as a Sensei of the Knight Class!

content: Your power is great, Portal Master, but together, we can make your Imaginators stronger than ever.
And I can show a Secret Technique to a Knight that will blow you away.
The power is strong in this one.
My skills are complete, but I'm always looking to improve.
I shall put an end to this conflict!
Dust in the wind, they are.
Only just getting started, I am.
I have become more powerful than ever.
The wind is at my back, always.

trivia: During a Grind Challenge, Wild Storm runs on all fours like a quadrupedal animal instead of on his two feet.
While Wild Storm's face is never truly seen, the shape of his mask and his thick mane of blue fur give his head the appearance of the horned lion's.
Wild Storm's mask is also animated; its 'mouth' narrows and widens as he breathes. One could say he breathes through his mask's hole.
During his Uproar or his beast form, his white glowing eyes inside the mask disappear. Instead, the metal ones on its 'forehead' glow temporarily.
One of his quotes, 'The power is strong with this one' is a reference to the popular Star Wars franchise quote, 'The Force is strong with this one'.
A number of Wild Storm's quotes follow the object-subject-verb pattern used by Master Yoda from Star Wars.
Wild Storm shares some similarities with Wildfire, including the word 'Wild' in their name and lion-like features.
Wild Storm and Pop Fizz are both blue-furred creatures that can transform into beastly versions of themselves.
Wild Storm bears multiple similarities to Tetrax Shard from the Ben 10 series.
He is the only Air Sensei without an alt deco.
Wild Storm is voiced by Keston John.
According to John, Wild Storm was called 'Atmosfear' during development.
He is one of the most expensive Senseis on the secondhand market.
gameplay: Wild Storm can use his blade both for melee attacks and throwing bolts of lightning. He is also skilled in hand-to-hand combat, using headbutts and a beast form to overpower foes close by. He can also create an uproar and breathe clouds into the battlefield, that can be electrified by his blade's lightning.

basic.name: Storm Strike
basic.content: Pressing Attack 1 continuously will trigger a four combo attack ending with a smashing headbutt.

basic.name: Lightning Bolt
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to create a lightning bolt from your sword.

basic_upgrades.name: Use Your Head!
basic_upgrades.content: Headbutt attacks now do more damage. That's using your head!

basic_upgrades.name: Uproar
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 to push enemies away with a windy cloudy roar.

basic_upgrades.name: Thunderstorms
basic_upgrades.content: After roaring, shoot your Lightning Bolt attack into any remaining clouds to create a destructive thunderstorm.

basic_upgrades.name: Uproar Galore
basic_upgrades.content: Your Uproar attack now covers a larger area. Enemies caught in the wind or clouds will be slowed down.

soulgems.name: Release the Beast
soulgems.content: Jump and press Attack 3 to transform into a wild beast. Press Attack 1 and Attack 2 to attack or Attack 3 to transform back to normal.

wow_pows.name: Unchained Lightning
wow_pows.content: Hold Special Attack to generate a destructive lightning storm with your sword! Run around to move the storm anywhere you wander.

abilities.name: Brute Edge
abilities.content: This new sword specializes and increases damage to any sword strike attacks.

abilities.name: Untamed Air
abilities.content: Using the Storm Strike attack in mid-air now causes bursts of air to knock enemies back.

abilities.name: Running Wild
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 during your headbutt attack to dash further. You can steer your headbutt around to go after certain enemies.

abilities.name: Cut Loose
abilities.content: This new sword specializes and increases damage to any Lightning Bolt attacks.

abilities.name: Chain Lighting
abilities.content: Pressing Attack 2 will now split your Lightning Bolt attack into three bolts.

abilities.name: Electrical Storm
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge your Lightning Bolt attack. Release to fire a giant electrical storm.
